steps.title: Find the remaining probability
steps.content:
Every visitor is in room A, room B, or room C, so the probabilities add to $1$:
$$
P(C)=1-0.62-0.30=0.08
$$

steps.title: Convert to visitors
steps.content: There are $500$ visitors total, so the number in room C is $$ 0.08(500)=40 $$ The answer is B.
